title: Kicked from the Party
overview: Rud is a tank, the member of an adventuring party that protects the others by soaking up attacks. When he is kicked out of his party for losing his absorb shield too quickly on a labyrinth raid, he considers what his next move should be.

title: Return to Avancia
overview: Rud returns to his hometown of Avancia with Luna in tow and reunites with his sister, who quickly takes to the new addition to the household.

title: An Unknown Monster
overview: Manicia worries that her illness has prevented her brother from pursuing a more rewarding path in life.

title: Selfish
overview: A fearsome chameleon kong is sighted near Avancia, and all the fighters in town band together to take it down. But where did it come from?

title: The Labyrinth's Manager
overview: After making a powerful new ally, Rud is given a crash course on how to manage a labyrinth. Meanwhile, his newly formed clan is struggling with all the demands being placed on it, so Rud decides an alliance with other clans is needed.

title: Lilia and Lily
overview: After a successful first raid on Keild Labyrinth, Rud's party returns the following day for a second attempt at clearing it, but they soon find themselves fighting extremely powerful monsters in dangerous uncharted territory.

title: Amon Sloth
overview: The battle with the guardian of the Keild Labyrinth commences, but have Rud and his party bitten off more than they can chew?

title: Monster Attack
overview: The homunculi finish construction on the town's new public baths and the adventurers plus Rud and his clan are the first to try them out. Meanwhile, a new threat rears its head on the horizon.

title: Demonic Power
overview: With Avancia's fate hanging in the balance, the final battle between Rud's party and the demon king known as Greed begins.
